text.title: WCAG 2.2 Compliance Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply WCAG 2.2 Compliance end-to-end. Each step names its input, action, output, and (where relevant) a decision-gate.

step.name: import-2-1-baseline
step.action: Load existing 2.1 AA findings as baseline; subtract removed criteria (4.1.1).

step.name: scan-9-new-sc
step.action: Run targeted check per the 9 new 2.2 SC.

step.name: validate-target-and-focus
step.action: Measure target size + focus visibility under sticky overlays; record violations.

step.name: validate-auth
step.action: Confirm at least one no-cog alternate per auth flow.
step.decision-gate: If no alternate, STOP — auth fail blocks AA.

step.name: publish-delta
step.action: Compile 2.2 delta conformance record; validate; archive.
